title: helichrysum mucronatum var. citreum
intro: Helichrysum mucronatum var. citreum, also known as the yellow-leafed or yellow-flowered helichrysum, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum mucronatum var. citreum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and even help to combat stress and anxiety. Helichrysum mucronatum var. citreum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to support skin health and overall well-being.
